name: caja-extensions-common
title: caja-extensions-common
description:
Caja extensions (common files)
Caja is the official file manager for the MATE desktop. This
package adds extended functionality to the Caja file manager.
.
This package contains the architecture independent files for
various available Caja extensions.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use caja-extensions-common because Caja extensions (common files).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use caja-extensions-common as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair caja-extensions-common with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `caja-extensions-common --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
